face.expression: sleepy bedroom eyes, lips slightly parted, calm and intimate

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A young woman in her early to mid 20s lies on her side in bed taking a morning selfie with an iPhone. She has a curvy hourglass figure with full natural chest, round feminine hips, and small soft waist. Her skin has a natural warm tone with real pores, natural warmth, and soft morning glow with zero smoothing. Her soft brunette hair is messy from sleeping, slightly flattened on one side with natural bed-head texture. Her light hazel eyes look directly into the front camera with sleepy bedroom eyes, lips slightly parted in a calm intimate expression. A fine-line minimal tattoo is visible on her side rib. She wears an oversized white sleep t-shirt made of very thin worn cotton, loose and falling off one shoulder with a slightly stretched collar soft from many washes. Her lower body is mostly covered by sheets. She lies in a natural relaxed arch with hips slightly rolled back toward camera, upper leg bent forward, lower leg extended under sheets. Her phone arm holds the iPhone close to her face while her free arm is tucked under the pillow. Her head tilts slightly into the pillow. The background shows unmade bed sheets, a pillow close to camera, soft natural daylight entering from a window, and a neutral bedroom wall. Soft warm morning sunlight creates gentle highlights on her skin and soft shadows. Slight grain and natural skin texture with no beauty filter. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Realistic texture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

flux-kontext-max.prompt: Young woman in her early 20s lying on her side in bed taking a morning iPhone selfie. Curvy hourglass figure with natural warm skin tone and real pores with morning glow. Soft brunette hair messy from sleeping, flattened on one side. Light hazel eyes with sleepy bedroom gaze looking directly at camera, lips slightly parted, calm intimate expression. Fine-line minimal tattoo on side rib. Wearing oversized white sleep t-shirt made of thin worn cotton, loose and falling off one shoulder, collar stretched. Lower body under sheets. Natural side-lying pose with hips rolled back, head tilted into pillow. Phone held close to face. Unmade bed sheets with pillow close to camera, soft daylight from window, neutral wall. Natural morning sunlight with soft warm highlights and gentle shadows. Slight grain, no beauty filter, raw iPhone selfie aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the white sleep t-shirt to light grey while keeping the messy morning hair and sleepy expression the same. Preserve the soft morning sunlight and intimate bedroom atmosphere.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed hair state (flattened one side), specific fabric (thin worn cotton), precise pose mechanics
2_realism_anchors: 'messy morning hair', 'worn cotton drape', 'natural skin pores', 'unmade sheets'
3_technical_camera: 'iPhone 15 Pro 24mm', 'slight grain', 'no beauty filter', 'raw selfie realism'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents beauty filter, skin smoothing, perfect hair, studio lighting
5_spatial_consistency: clear side-lying pose with arm positions and body alignment
7_authenticity: specific just-woke-up details (hair flattened, stretched collar, sleepy eyes)
